new_listing_correction.only_change: Permit genuine 20-59-session post-listing histories under a separate cross-check branch; preserve every available row and never pre-IPO fill, replace, or remove the member.
new_listing_correction.long_branch: If total valid Yahoo sessions >=60: compare latest at most 120 common complete Yahoo/Sina sessions; require common sessions >=60 and pass ratio strictly >0.98 within 0.5%.
new_listing_correction.short_branch: If total valid Yahoo sessions is 20-59: compare every available common complete Yahoo/Sina session; require common sessions >=20 and pass ratio strictly >0.98 within 0.5%; set short_history=true and record first_date and row_count.
new_listing_correction.fail_closed: Yahoo sessions <20 or common cross-check sessions <20 is INPUT_BLOCKED.
new_listing_correction.strategy_eligibility: A symbol is eligible at a formation only when the required t, t-21, and t-252 adjusted-close sessions exist; short-history names remain ineligible until sufficient history. Monthly qualified count remains >=30.

frozen_inputs.universe: Exactly frozen current 50 companies and 50 liquidity-selected stock lines plus SPY/XLG diagnostics.

data_sources.canonical: Pinned GSD Yahoo chart explicit UTC period1=1420070400, period2=1784764800, interval=1d, events=div,splits, includeAdjustedClose=true; raw OHLCV plus adjclose.
data_sources.crosscheck_only: Pinned GSD us_stock_kline_sina, uppercase standard ticker, num=120, Referer=https://finance.sina.com.cn/.

central_data.writer: quant_system.data.writer.append_rows with existing lock and DuckDB transaction
central_data.publication: Acquire and validate all 52 symbols in staging; isolated-copy append/replay-idempotency/conflict test; exact backup; then one bounded canonical publication with no partial symbol writes.
central_data.postwrite: Exact receipt plus symbol/date/row counts, duplicates, nonfinite, coverage including short-history first_date/row_count, Yahoo hashes, DB identity/SHA, WAL and openers.

strategy_after_central_ready.selection: Top10, hold through rank15, equal 10%, long-only, no leverage.
strategy_after_central_ready.benchmark: Same-date qualified current-Top50 equal weight; SPY/XLG diagnostic only.
strategy_after_central_ready.pass_gates: Base CAGR excess >1pp; Sharpe >= benchmark; MDD shortfall <=5pp; stress excess >0; turnover <=200%; at least two positive relative subperiods among 2016-2019, 2020-2022, 2023-latest.
